# whiteb0x.com

> A development studio specializing in full-stack engineering, web applications, and blockchain protocols.

## About

white b0x inc. is a development studio. We build software that matters — from web applications to blockchain protocols. Our work spans Web2 and Web3, delivering cutting-edge solutions with a focus on performance, design, and reliability.

## Services

- Full-stack web application development
- Blockchain protocol engineering
- Smart contract development and auditing
- UI/UX design and interactive experiences
- DevOps and infrastructure

## Contact

- Email: contact@whiteb0x.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/white-b0x
- Website: https://whiteb0x.com
